sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الأُمُّ تَحْمِلُ الطِّفْلَ عَلَى ظَهْرِهَا وَتَعْمَلُ.
sentences.translation: Majka je nosila dijete na leđima i radila.
sentences.translationEn: The mother used to carry the child on her back and work.

sentences.translation: Obrađivala je zemlju i skupljala voće.
sentences.translationEn: She would cultivate the land and gather fruits.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ قَوِيَّةً وَتَعْمَلُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Žena je bila snažna i radila je svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: The woman was strong and worked every day.

sentences.translation: Porodica se jako oslanjala na nju.
sentences.translationEn: The family depended on her a great deal.
